chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Appln. No. S – 31 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh cases 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 23.06.2023 Syed Asghar Ali Shah, Advocate for the Applicant <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel’s grievance appears to be that the case before learned Anti-Terrorism Court, Khairpur is moving at a very slow pace. His second grievance as raised that the learned trial Judge has granted post- arrest bail to one of the accused. The grounds raised by learned counsel do not merit transfer of the case; however, learned trial Court is directed to ensure an expeditious conclusion of the trial, no adjournment should be granted to either party on any flimsy or frivolous grounds. The Criminal Transfer Application is disposed of in the above terms. Let a copy of this order be sent to the learned trial Court for information. Judge ARBROHI
